title: Print/View Multiple Docs at once? (Not Items)
excerpt: I am trying to use Monday Workdocs to create and manage Standard Operating Procedures.  I am creating different Docs which are each focused on a different “chapter”.  I am trying to find a way to view/print the whole man…

posts.author: KenElliott (Ken Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to use Monday Workdocs to create and manage Standard Operating Procedures. I am creating different Docs which are each focused on a different “chapter”. I am trying to find a way to view/print the whole manual (collection of Docs).

Any ideas?

Ken

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Ken! Charlotte here from the monday team!

It isn’t possible to print multiple workdocs at the same time but this is a really great suggestion! We’d love for you to add it to our feature request page so our product team can take a look! They check out the request features there when deciding what to add to the product roadmap.

In the meantime, you will have to individually print the workdocs but perhaps, as a workaround, you could export them to PDFs and then combine the PDFs into one single document and then print that one.

Let us know if this would work for you!
